summary: Tested Menu Automation setup (backend API + frontend dashboard + Docker/deployment artifacts). All 4 backend pytest cases pass and all frontend dashboard checks pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Docker artifacts and DEPLOYMENT.md are present at /app and correctly structured.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking, informational).
docker-compose.yml uses legacy 'version: 3.9' key which is ignored by Compose v2 (harmless but noisy warning).

CORS_ORIGINS default '*' combined with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per CORS spec (browsers ignore credentials with wildcard origin). Not blocking dev, but tighten CORS_ORIGINS before public deploy (already noted in DEPLOYMENT.md handover checklist).

backend.GET /api/datasets/stats: 200 - exists=true, total_files=33, batches=7 (each with positive file_count; 5+5+5+5+5+5+3 = 33)
backend.GET /api/status: 200 - array contains created record, no _id leak in any item

frontend.status-pill-*: 3 pills all green (API Online, MongoDB Connected, Datasets Ready)

docker_artifacts./app/Dockerfile.backend: python:3.11-slim, copies backend + datasets, healthcheck on /api/health, exposes 8001
docker_artifacts./app/Dockerfile.frontend: multi-stage node:20-alpine build -> nginx:1.27-alpine, accepts REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL build arg
docker_artifacts./app/nginx.conf: SPA fallback + /api proxy_pass to http://backend:8001, gzip, /healthz edge probe
docker_artifacts./app/docker-compose.yml: mongo + backend + frontend wired with healthchecks, named volume mongo_data

test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Single TEST_pytest_client status record written to Mongo during test_create_and_list_status (idempotent; can be left).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Setup-phase app: only 5 API endpoints (/, /health, /datasets/stats, POST /status, GET /status) and a single dashboard page. No auth, no complex flows. Pytest lives at /app/backend/tests/test_menu_automation.py. Docker build was NOT actually executed per instructions (no docker-in-docker) — only static inspection of artifacts.
